name: Bachelor Buttons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, rub the butter into the flour.
3. In a small bowl, beat the egg with half of the sugar.
4. Add the egg mixture and the remaining sugar to the butter and flour mixture.
5. Add the salt and nutmeg and mix well.
6. Roll the dough between the palms of your hands to form 18 pieces, each about the size of a walnut.
7. Moisten your hands or dust them with flour for rolling the dough.
8. Sprinkle dough pieces lightly with sugar.
9. Place the dough pieces 2-3 inches apart on a cookie sheet lined with buttered parchment paper.
10. Bake until very lightly browned around the edges and bottoms, about 8 minutes. (The tops should be done but not browned.)
11. Remove from oven and transfer to a wire rack.
12. Cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
